name: agent-council
description: Runtime-portable 5-agent quality gate for tier-1 artifacts — installable as a Claude Code plugin or via APM in any compatible harness (Claude Code, Copilot CLI, Cursor, Cline, OpenCode).

plugins.name: agent-council
plugins.description: Quality-gate any text artifact through 5 role-conditioned LLM deliberators (Skeptic, Voice & Identity, Evidence & Calibration, Strategy & Stakes, Adjudicator). 2-round async + cross-read. Returns SHIP/REVISE/HOLD + revision brief. v0.1.1 adds 5 deliberator-as-Skills for interactive single-perspective review in any APM harness alongside the existing Claude Code slash commands + MCP server.

skills.name: adjudicator-synthesis
skills.description: [SYNTHESIS, NOT A DELIBERATOR] Synthesizes 2+ deliberator-skill outputs into a SHIP/REVISE/HOLD verdict. Load at least 2 of skeptic-review, voice-identity-review, evidence-calibration-review, strategy-stakes-review first.
